title: Intelligent Workspace for Stroovo
description: Intelligent workspace designed to centralize team collaboration, AI agents, and task management.
challenge: Teams faced context switching and data silos across multiple tools.
solution: We developed an AI-powered workspace combining document retrieval, task delegation, and AI copilots into a unified platform.

title: AI-Powered E-commerce for Wearino
description: Developed a high-performance headless e-commerce store with real-time inventory and AI-driven recommendations.
challenge: Wearino needed a high-performance e-commerce architecture capable of managing complex real-time inventory and secure localized payments.
solution: We engineered a scalable platform using Next.js 16 and NestJS, integrating Stripe, AI chatbots, and real-time inventory sync.

title: Telehealth SaaS Platform
description: Designed and built a multi-tenant SaaS platform for telehealth providers, ensuring HIPAA compliance and a seamless user experience.
challenge: HealthConnect needed a scalable SaaS platform to enable remote consultations, appointment scheduling, and secure data management for multiple clinics.
solution: We created a HIPAA-compliant, cloud-based telehealth platform with real-time video calling, role-based access control, and analytics dashboards for clinicians and administrators.
results: Enabled multi-clinic scalability within one platform
Ensured 100% compliance with HIPAA and GDPR standards

title: Intelligent Lead Platform
description: A sophisticated SaaS sales solution leveraging advanced AI and Machine Learning to transform raw sales data into actionable intelligence and predictive insights.
challenge: Modern sales teams struggle with effectively prioritizing leads, analyzing complex customer interactions, and accurately forecasting growth. Traditional CRMs lack the predictive capabilities required to optimize sales workflows and drive targeted follow-ups.
solution: We engineered an intelligent SaaS platform combining a high-performance Next.js and TypeScript frontend with a fast, low-latency Python and FastAPI backend. Extensive R&D was conducted to train ML models using TensorFlow and Scikit-learn for dynamic lead scoring, conversation prediction, and sales growth forecasting, all containerized via Docker.
results: Deployed ML algorithms that accurately assign quality scores to prioritize high-potential prospects.
Trained models to analyze conversation history and predict conversion probabilities for tailored follow-ups.
Built predictive visualization models based on historical sales data to forecast future performance.
